news.headline: By 2028, 237 LNG projects are expected to start operations, with 154 being regasification projects and 83 liquefaction projects. Asia dominates with 99 regasification projects, China leading with 35.
news.summary: A report titled "LNG New-Build and Expansion Projects Outlook to 2028" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering. Worldwide, there are a projected 237 LNG projects set to commence operations between 2024 and 2028. Within this total, 154 projects are related to regasification, while 83 are focused on liquefaction. The Asian region is anticipated to have the most significant presence in the global LNG market, with 99 regasification projects expected to be operational by 2028. China is at the forefront among countries, with 35 regasification projects projected to begin operations.

news.headline: UFC's Reed Harris joins BioAdaptives as advisor, boasting 40-year career in Athlete Development and Marketing.
news.summary: With over four decades of experience, Harris serves as the Senior Vice President of Athlete Development and Marketing at the Ultimate Fighting Championship.

news.headline: Auquan introduces first AI agent for Financial Services Sustainability Teams; platform enhances engagement and value creation.
news.summary: In both London and New York, a recent press release announced the launch of Auquan's AI platform, which aims to assist teams in breaking free from the burdensome task of manual data collection, allowing them to concentrate on generating value and improving stakeholder involvement.

news.headline: Lithuanian Competition Council's decision on Lrytas acquisition is pending, AS Ekspress Grupp awaits official confirmation.
news.summary: AS Ekspress Grupp addressed the speculation circulating in the Lithuanian media regarding the Lithuanian Competition Council's decision on the acquisition of Lrytas. The company clarified that no official decision has been received yet. AS Ekspress Grupp stated that it will immediately update the market once an official decision is provided by the Competition Authority.

news.headline: Oman's construction industry grew by 3.3% in 2024, driven by FDI in manufacturing and government investments in transport and tourism.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Oman Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com, offering insights up to 2028. The construction sector in Oman experienced a 3.3% real terms growth in 2024. This growth is attributed to increased foreign direct investment (FDI), particularly in manufacturing, alongside significant government investment. The report analyzes various sectors including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets.

news.headline: Equity LifeStyle Properties declares $0.515 Q1 2025 dividend per common share on Feb. 4, 2025.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 4, 2025, Equity LifeStyle Properties, Inc. announced a first quarter 2025 dividend of $0.515 per common share. This decision was made by the Board of Directors. The company is known as ELS and is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol ELS. This dividend amount translates to an annualized rate of...

news.headline: 3D Cloud and Common Sense Machines team up to reduce 3D asset creation time, aiming to accelerate within 12-18 months.
news.summary: In the upcoming 12 to 18 months, a collaboration between 3D Cloud and Common Sense Machines in ST. PETERSBURG, Fla., is set to significantly accelerate the process of creating 3D assets. 3D Cloud, known for its expertise in 3D digital asset management and product visualization for furniture and home improvement, has joined forces with Common Sense Machines. This partnership aims to enhance the speed of 3D asset creation within the specified timeframe.

news.headline: High burnout levels hinder healthcare in Europe and U.S., AI seen as solution; Europe lags in AI adoption.
news.summary: In the realm of healthcare, Artificial Intelligence (AI) is seen as a potential savior. However, challenges such as unsuccessful trials, restricted opportunities, and a shortage of expertise hinder healthcare professionals. Europe trails behind the U.S. in embracing and implementing AI technologies. Variations are observed within the European markets as well.

news.headline: SPX FLOW's APV brand wins SEAL Sustainable Product Award second time for Seamless Infusion Vessel innovation.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina on February 6, 2025, APV, a brand under SPX FLOW, has been honored with the 2025 SEAL Business Sustainability Award for their innovative Seamless Infusion Vessel. This award highlights SPX FLOW's dedication to promoting sustainability and efficiency in their practices.

news.headline: W. Capra merges with Impact 21, now operating fully as W. Capra with a new brand. Stream emphasizes the benefits of the unity.
news.summary: In Chicago today, W. Capra revealed that the acquisition of Impact 21 is now complete, with the latter fully operating under the W. Capra name. The company introduced a new brand to signal this integration, aiming to leverage their combined capabilities to enhance client service in their industries. The partnership, forged in April, has now culminated in the unification of both entities, paving the way for a more cohesive approach to their offerings. Mike Streams, a Partner at W. Capra, expressed enthusiasm about the merger, stating that the consolidation positions the organization effectively.

news.headline: Michael F. Price Memorial Grant of $125,000 awarded by DeGregorio Family Foundation for new cancer therapy.
news.summary: In New York on February 6, 2025, the DeGregorio Family Foundation, with backing from the Torrey Coast Foundation Gastro Esophageal Investigator Network Initiative (GEMINI), has granted $125,000 to Timothy C. Wang, MD. Dr. Wang, Chief of the Division of Digestive and Liver Diseases at Silberberg, is the recipient of this award.

news.headline: Grocery TV partners with Giant Eagle to bring digital advertising to nearly 200 supermarkets, enhancing omnichannel strategy.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 6, 2025, Grocery TV, the top in-store retail media platform, revealed its collaboration with Giant Eagle to enhance the company's omnichannel strategy. This partnership will introduce digital advertising in close to 200 supermarkets. This move is expected to significantly boost Giant Eagle's reach and engagement with customers across various locations.

news.headline: Onondaga County, NY, along with Verra Mobility, deploys advanced tech in 6 districts, 500 buses to enhance student safety.
news.summary: Six school districts in MESA, Arizona will be utilizing innovative technology across 500 school buses to address the issue of drivers unlawfully passing stopped school buses. Verra Mobility Corporation, a prominent smart mobility technology provider, is behind this initiative. The deployment of this technology aims to enhance safety measures and prevent dangerous incidents on the road.

news.headline: Choice Hotels and Choice Privileges members raise $90,000 for American Red Cross California wildfire relief.
news.summary: In North Bethesda, Maryland on February 6, 2025, Choice Hotels International, Inc. along with participants of the Choice Privileges rewards program initiated a campaign resulting in donations close to $90,000. These funds were directed towards supporting the American Red Cross in providing relief to communities affected by...

news.headline: Panama President: I asked the ambassador in Washington to take firm steps to deny situation regarding canal fees.
$8M bank syndication financing secured by Mag Mile Capital for manufactured home park in Boardman, OR.
news.summary: Mag Mile Capital, Inc. has announced the successful completion of an $8 million bank syndication program financing for a manufactured home park project in Boardman, Oregon. The loan, secured with a 65% loan-to-cost ratio, features a five-year term, with an initial 18-month interest-only period during development, followed by a 25-year amortization schedule. The deal was overseen by Mag Mile Capital’s CEO, Rushi Shah, and SVP of Underwriting and Originations, Prabhat Jayara.

news.headline: Jeffs' Brands to merge Fort Products with Impact Acquisitions Corp at $12M valuation, creating Nasdaq-listed entity.
news.summary: Tel Aviv, Israel, on February 6, 2025 - Jeffs' Brands Ltd, an e-commerce company operating on the Amazon Marketplace, disclosed today the finalization of a merger agreement with Fort Products Limited, a UK-based subsidiary, and Impact Acquisitions Corp. The merger will combine Fort Products with Impact, a capital pool company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange. Jeffs' Brands, listed under Nasdaq as JFBR and JFBRW, had previously mentioned this merger in a press release on January 3, 2025.

news.headline: UK investment outlook positive, says AstraZeneca CEO.
TrueFoundry raises $19M Series A funding led by Intel Capital to scale AI deployment with Autopilot agent.
news.summary: San Francisco-based TrueFoundry, a prominent AI deployment and scaling platform, revealed that it successfully secured $19 million in Series A funding. The funding round was primarily spearheaded by Intel Capital. Additionally, previous investors Eniac Ventures and Peak XV’s Surge (previously known as Sequoia Capital India & SEA) also contributed to the funding. Joining them were new investor Jump Capital and several angel investors, such as Gokul Rajaram, Mohit Aron, and executives from Fortune 1000 companies. As part of this financial development, Avi Bharadwaj, Investment Director at Intel C, played a crucial role.

news.headline: Cognida.ai raises $15M Series A from Nexus Venture Partners to revolutionize enterprise AI adoption, deployed successfully at 30+ orgs.
news.summary: In Chicago, Cognida.ai, a prominent provider of practical AI solutions for businesses, has revealed the completion of its Series A funding round, securing an impressive $15 million. The funding was primarily led by Nexus Venture Partners. This significant investment serves as validation for Cognida.ai's innovative strategy to streamline AI integration, making it lucrative for companies. Their success is evident through successful installations at more than 30 top firms. In an industry where 80% of AI initiatives falter and usually require 6-8 months for implementation, Cognida.ai stands out as a success story.

news.headline: Cellid Inc. secures $13 million funding to advance AR glasses display development, enhancing mass production and accelerating product launches.
news.summary: Tokyo, February 6, 2025 - Cellid Inc., a company specializing in AR glasses displays and spatial recognition engines for advanced devices, has successfully secured a funding of USD 13 million to boost mass production and accelerate product launches. The company aims to increase adoption of its technology by enhancing manufacturing capabilities and ramping up the introduction of new products to the market.

news.headline: Mobile Pathways receives $1M funding for AI tools in immigration justice from key partners.
news.summary: Mobile Pathways, a prominent tech company based in San Francisco, has secured funding from major supporters including AlleyCorp, Fast Forward, Firedoll Foundation, and the GitLab Foundation. This substantial funding will enable Mobile Pathways to further develop their innovative AI tools designed for immigration legal cases. The announcement was made on February 6, 2025. The total amount of funding obtained has not been disclosed.

news.headline: Elegoo to launch pre-orders for Centauri Carbon, their first CoreXY FDM 3D printer, on Feb 17 at 9 AM EST.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on February 6, 2025, Elegoo, a fast-growing brand in smart manufacturing, shared on its website that pre-orders for the Centauri Carbon, its inaugural CoreXY FDM 3D printer, will commence at 9 AM EST on February 17.

news.headline: VTG secures spot on $33B DoDIAC contract for research and development. Important date: Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: In Chantilly, Virginia on February 6, 2025, VTG, a top national security solutions provider, disclosed its success in securing a position on the Department of Defense Information Analysis Center (DoDIAC) multiple-award contract (MAC). This contract allows VTG to offer essential research and development services for missions.

news.headline: Bristol Myers Squibb warns of near-term impact due to generics, announces $2 billion cost cuts. Q4 revenues: $12.34 billion, up 8% YoY. Opdivo sales at $2.48 billion. Portfolio growth at $6.36 billion.
news.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb & Co (NYSE:BMY) reported fourth-quarter revenues of $12.34 billion, surpassing the expected $11.57 billion. Sales saw an 8% year-over-year increase, or 9% when adjusted for foreign exchange effects. This boost was mainly attributed to the Growth Portfolio and increased demand for Eliquis. However, these gains were somewhat offset by generics impacting Sprycel, Revlimid, Abraxane, and Pomalyst. The Growth Portfolio's global revenues rose to $6.36 billion, reflecting a 21% growth on a reported basis or 23% when adjusted for foreign exchange effects. Opdivo sales also saw a 4% increase, reaching $2.48 billion.

news.headline: First Ntl (NASDAQ: FXNC) Q4 earnings beat estimates by 32.0% - announced on Feb 6, 2025 at 07:30 AM.
news.summary: First Ntl (NASDAQ: FXNC) released its Q4 earnings report on Thursday, February 6, 2025, at 07:30 AM. The company exceeded expected earnings by 32.0%. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Lightspeed Commerce (LSPD) beats Q3 earnings by 20%, reports EPS of $0.12. Check out full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: On Thursday, February 6, 2025, Lightspeed Commerce (NYSE:LSPD) released its Q3 earnings at 07:00 AM. The company surpassed expected earnings by 20.0%, with an EPS of $0.12, outperforming initial projections. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Beacon (Nasdaq: BECN) to release Q4 and 2024 earnings on February 27, 2025 at 8:30 am EST, as per previous year's timing.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia, Beacon (Nasdaq: BECN) disclosed that it will unveil its earnings report for the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024, prior to the market opening on Thursday, February 27, 2025, in line with the previous year. A conference call and webcast to address the financial outcomes will be conducted by the company at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Those interested, including analysts and investors, are encouraged to sign up to participate in the earnings call and presentation.

news.headline: Myanmar construction industry output shrunk by 6% in 2024 due to various challenges, forecast to recover by 2028.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Myanmar Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The construction industry in Myanmar experienced a 6% contraction in 2024 due to various factors including increased material costs, labor shortages, supply chain disruptions, currency devaluation, and ongoing civil conflict resulting in the departure of international participants. The report analyzes market sectors such as Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets, providing insights up to 2028.

news.headline: Beazer Homes speeds up share repurchases due to stock price drop. $24.8M left in buyback program. $4.1M bought since Jan 30.
news.summary: Beazer Homes USA, Inc. (NYSE: BZH) of Atlanta is ramping up its share repurchase efforts due to recent share price fluctuations. The company is utilizing its existing share repurchase program, which still has $24.8 million left. Following the first quarter of 2025 earnings report on January 30th, Beazer Homes has already bought back around $4.1 million worth of its shares. #GetMoreWithBeazer.

news.headline: Tri Pointe Homes starts new community in Heber City, UT with 139 homes. First sales expected in summer 2025. Ceremony held on Feb. 5.
news.summary: Tri Pointe Homes, a leading homebuilder listed on NYSE as TPH, initiated the construction of a new community in Heber City, Utah, named The Crossings at Lake Creek. This planned development by Tri Pointe Homes will comprise approximately 139 single-family residences. The community's initial homes are expected to be available for purchase by summer 2025. The groundbreaking event that took place on Feb. 5 featured speeches from Tri Pointe Homes officials.

news.headline: Czech Republic cuts rates due to lower inflation and weak growth.
Saquon Barkley invests in Ramp; featured in company's first Big Game ad on NYSE platform.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 6, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) commended the financial operations platform Ramp for onboard Philadelphia Eagles' acclaimed running back, Saquon Barkley, as both an investor and the face of the company's initial Big Game advertisement. This move highlights the growing trend of athletes diversifying their portfolios, with Barkley's involvement poised to bring added value to Ramp. The collaboration signifies a strategic business decision, leveraging Barkley's star power and financial acumen to resonate with a wider audience.

news.headline: Willdan Group to release Q4 2024 financial results on March 6, 2025, with investor conference call at 5:30 p.m. EST.
news.summary: Willdan Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: WLDN) based in Anaheim, California, has disclosed its plan to reveal the financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 post market closing on Thursday, March 6, 2025. The company is scheduled to conduct an investor conference call at 5:30 p.m. EST / 2:30 p.m. PST following the announcement. For those interested, an online live audio webcast of the quarterly investor conference call can be accessed on Willdan’s website at the specified time.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures up as Arm Holdings falls despite beating views; Tesla skids while BYD soars.
news.summary: Arm Holdings exceeded expectations but experienced a decline due to underwhelming guidance following a surge in AI chip stocks the previous day. Tesla shares continued to drop while BYD saw a significant increase. Dow Jones futures are on the rise amidst these developments.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures climb after jobless claims; Roblox plunges 28% on sales miss. Nvidia's Arm stock also drops.
news.summary: On Thursday, Dow Jones futures experienced an increase following unexpected weekly jobless claims. The stock of Nvidia partner Arm declined due to earnings, whereas Roblox saw a significant decrease. Roblox crashed by 28% as a result of missing sales targets.

news.headline: Trustly partners with Spreedly to offer Pay by Bank globally, enhancing conversion rates for merchants.
news.summary: In SAN CARLOS, Calif., Trustly, the top Pay by Bank provider, revealed a new partnership with Spreedly, the leading Open Payments Platform globally. This collaboration aims to offer merchants complete access to Pay by Bank, enhancing conversion rates and streamlining payments across various regional and global markets. By teaming up, Trustly and Spreedly enable businesses using Spreedly to leverage Trustly's Pay by Bank functionalities, resulting in increased efficiency.

news.headline: Know Labs' formalized client engagement process for KTL is launched to integrate RFDS tech with 300+ global patents.
news.summary: In Seattle, Know Labs, Inc. (OTC: KNWN) has officially introduced its structured client engagement process for Know Labs Technology Licensing (KTL). This process aims to facilitate a smooth integration and innovation opportunity with KTL's patented Radio Frequency Dielectric Spectroscopy (RFDS) technology, products, and services for corporations, universities, and research institutions. This launch leverages Know Labs' extensive intellectual property (IP) portfolio, which includes over 300 global patents.

news.headline: Planet Labs will participate in Citi conference on Feb 19th, 2025. Robert Cardillo will speak about Earth insights.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Planet Labs PBC (NYSE: PL), a prominent Earth data provider, disclosed that Robert Cardillo, Chief Strategist and Chairman of Planet Federal's Board, will engage in a fireside chat at Citi’s 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on February 19, 2025, at 2:40 p.m. EST. The dialogue, led by Jason Gursky, Managing Director & Equity Research Analyst at Citi, will feature insights from Cardillo about the company's strategies. This event showcases the industry's rapid advancements and future projections.

news.headline: CertaPro Painters® acquires majority interest in CertaPro Painters® of San Francisco, expanding its operations in Northern California.
news.summary: An announcement was made by a franchise organization regarding their fourth strategic joint-venture in AUDUBON, Pennsylvania on February 6, 2025. CertaPro Painters®, known as North America's Most Referred Painting Company®, has bought a majority stake in CertaPro Painters® of San Francisco. This acquisition marks the fourth company-owned operation for CertaPro Painters®.

news.headline: Private equity firm Avathon Capital acquires founder-owned early childhood education platform Yellow Brick Road, strengthening commitment to education. Located in the Midwest, the acquisition marks a significant investment in the sector.
news.summary: Avathon Capital, a private equity firm focused on the lower middle-market, has made an investment in Yellow Brick Road, a center-based platform operating in the Midwest region. With its strong background in early childhood education, Avathon is aiming to support the growth of Yellow Brick Road, a founder-owned company. The investment was announced on Feb. 6, 2025, in Chicago and Minneapolis. This move is part of Avathon's strategic plan to expand its portfolio and leverage its expertise in the sector.

news.headline: Polar Racking aims to reach 10GW annual production for global solar projects, with 5GW total capacity. US job creation prioritized.
news.summary: Polar Racking, a prominent company specializing in cutting-edge solar mounting solutions, announced on February 6, 2025, its strategic plan to focus on producing content and generating job opportunities within the United States. The company, based in Toronto, emphasizes its commitment to domestic growth and employment as part of its expansion efforts. With an extensive total production capacity of 5 gigawatts (GW) spread across its various locations worldwide, Polar Racking is determined to strengthen its presence in the US market.

news.headline: Dr. Harry Salinas named 2025 Top Patient Rated Plastic Surgeon in Miami by Find Local Doctors, praised for advanced surgical skills.
news.summary: Renowned for his exceptional surgical expertise, Dr. Salinas has transformed the lives of numerous patients with remarkable outcomes. Specializing in reconstructive plastic surgery of the breast and face, he brings a wealth of experience to his practice. Recently recognized as a top professional in 2025, Dr. Salinas operates out of Bay Harbor Islands in Florida.

news.headline: Mexico's Gutierrez: Mexico wants to substitute semiconductor imports.
Spruce by Procter & Gamble (NYSE: PG) is a worry-free weed killer for lawns, showing visible results in one hour.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, Spruce, a powerful weed & grass killer developed by Procter & Gamble (NYSE: PG), is offering a solution for reclaiming your yard this spring. This innovative product promises visible results within just one hour of application. Differentiating itself in the lawn and garden market, Spruce consists of only nine basic yet efficient ingredients, ensuring safety for both individuals and pets when used as instructed. Families can now freely enjoy outdoor spaces without worrying about harmful chemicals.

news.headline: Eco-friendly TP brand Who Gives A Crap offers 'World Dump Day' breakup service; 42% Americans struggle with breakups.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, a recent study by the sustainable toilet paper company Who Gives A Crap revealed that 42% of Americans find breaking up difficult due to not wanting to hurt their partner’s feelings, and 17% struggle with finding the right words to say. To address this, Who Gives A Crap is launching a one-day breakup service on February 13, known as World Dump Day. The service aims to assist individuals in ending unsatisfactory relationships with empathy and humor. This unique service offers a thoughtful and human approach to breakups.

news.headline: True Religion launches "Own Your True" platform with Brazilian Pop Star Anitta during Super Bowl week in 2025.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, True Religion is starting off the year 2025 by introducing its fresh brand platform called "Own Your True."

news.headline: Philip Morris shares soar as forecast exceeds analyst predictions.
Chinese wind exports drive global market shift, expanding swiftly.
Fiber Broadband Association's study shows stable or slightly increasing deployment costs, improvement from previous year.
news.summary: In Washington, the Fiber Broadband Association released its Fiber Deployment Cost Annual Report, carried out by Cartesian. The report analyzed the expenses associated with fiber broadband deployment. It revealed that broadband service providers anticipate similar or slightly increased future costs compared to 2024, with a projected increase of less than 10%. This represents a noticeable improvement from the previous year's findings. Specifically, median costs for underground deployment saw a year-over-year change.
